textByHash.4b04899b45d62b1de40d58cb5817d6a424e2877d: A good day to you, sir!
textByHash.83e7a70547ab07447a8063e22e2ff24b6caec20c: A fair bit if I say so myself, yes. What do you want to know?
textByHash.9845e2cd305ae858e237514886ed54cc45ce033e: Ah, very rare that is! Very rare indeed. This place doesn't stock it. Don't think the Laughing Miner does either.
textByHash.1a4ff66d005980548d5fd041cfab8ddae02145d6: Then you'll probably need some seeds!
textByHash.8afa57296c9415d0ac25c1a6c2aaefa737de13cb: Have a toast to our good health with me and I'll tell you!
textByHash.4f454219395721a5d867ac1cf4e7b6938a7f9629: That was fun! Here, I've got one Kelda seed left. A sociable chap like you is more than welcome to it.
textByHash.44bfa1db5f50053b6d00fddc06f80d01bc3e71d3: Then go get something from the bar!
textByHash.b364d67e07a21da8b282c253cba63d8f62eefe4c: Were you going to have a toast to our good health?
textByHash.02638a60d4af964f5336887997226d6f7cbc5765: I say, I say, a toast to this fine human!
textByHash.a97773ad6b51dd7f5cc8b51f7618d86fe45a5f2e: No no, get a pint of beer, jugs of wine aren't good to toast with! Wine stains are terribly hard to wash out of a beard.
